description_long: This object is a pair of modern, front-loading washing machines or a washer and dryer set, finished in a sleek black color. Each unit features a large circular door with a glossy, reflective surface, surrounded by a subtle trim. The control panels are located at the top front of each unit, equipped with a combination of digital displays, rotary dials, and push buttons, all clearly labeled for user interaction. The sides and back of the units are plain, with smooth, unadorned surfaces, while the tops are flat and could serve as a temporary surface for lightweight items. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban laundry rooms, garages, or utility spaces. No interior drum or detergent drawer is visible from the provided views.
description: A sleek, black, front-loading washer and dryer set with large circular doors and digital control panels on top. The design is modern and minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a glossy finish on the doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large circular doors, digital control panels, and all interactive features.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, smooth side surface and the depth of the units.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat, featureless backs of both units.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the smooth, unadorned side surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panels are located at the top front of each unit, featuring a digital display, a rotary dial, and several push buttons arranged horizontally. The interface is clearly labeled and designed for intuitive use.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular glass doors with a black trim and integrated handle, hinged on the left side of each unit.
attribute_brand_logo: A small circular logo is visible on the upper left corner of the left unit's front panel, but the text or symbol is not clearly readable.
